changelog:
Expanded Horizons Mod Manager — v2.3.0

⚠ Important
- Settings path has changed due to the new profile system.
- Please back up or note your current multipliers before updating.

Added:
- Profile Management system (Import / Export support)
- 2 new mods for Building Settings
- Loot Guide updated with clearer and more detailed information
- Pak creation now performs automatic cleanup of old EH_* files (~mods folder)
- Installer now correctly respects the selected installation path

Fixed:
- Issues affecting multiplier values

UI Changes:
- Sliders now have hidden position indicators
- Added labels to selected sliders
- Modules now open with single-click instead of double-click

----------------------------------------

Expanded Horizons Mod Manager — v2.3.1

Fixed:
- Open mod folder being disabled after importing or adding a new profile

Added:
- Changelog is now displayed in the update prompt
- Added warning when changes are made but not yet applied
